2026-04-26T16:22:00.CONTENT_EN: All car parks at West Kowloon Cultural District are full. Members of the public are encouraged to take public transport to the West Kowloon Cultural District.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) adds temporary train trips

2026-04-27T09:40:00.CONTENT_EN: In response to the demand, the High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will add the following temporary train trips: 30 Apr to 3 May From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5834, G5836, G5838, G5840, G5842, G5844, G5846, G5848, G5850, G5852, G5854, G5856, G5868 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5833, G5835, G5837, G5839, G5841, G5843, G5845, G5847, G5849, G5851, G5853, G5855, G5867 4-5 May: From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Shenzhenbei Station: G5680 From Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Futian Station: G5866 From Shenzhenbei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5679 From Futian Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station: G5865 Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website or mobile app; appointed travel agents; or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station. For train schedules, please refer to the 12306 official website or mobile app, or the High Speed Rail website or mobile app.

2026-04-27T10:28:00.CONTENT_EN: As it is the peak period for travel, please: 1. allow more time for immigration procedures. You may enter the gate at Level B1 up to 120 minutes before the departure of your train. 2. visit the 12306 official website (12306. cn) or mobile app to check for the latest train schedules and any service adjustments. 3. use public transport to get to the station as parking places will be in high demand. 4. use the drop-off/pick-up area at the Ground level, Exit B (Wui Man Road pick-up/drop-off area) for pre-booked taxis or vehicles.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity during weekend

2026-04-27T12:27:00.CONTENT_EN: Members of the public are advised that, the traffic within Wo Hop Shek Cemetery and in its vicinity (including Tai Wo Service Road West, Wah Ming Road, Wo Hing Road and Pak Wo Road, etc. ) is expected to be busier on this weekend. The Police will implement temporary traffic control measures depending on actual situation. Motorists are advised to watch out for the latest traffic news through media. In case of traffic congestion, motorists should exercise tolerance and patience, and follow the instructions of the Police.

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Enhanced cross-boundary train service during Labour Day and Golden Week

2026-04-28T12:05:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that To meet passengersвҖҷ travel needs, East Rail Line train frequency will be increased during selected periods for the Labour Day and вҖңGolden WeekвҖқ holiday (30 April вҖ“ 5 May). Please refer to MTR's website for more information.

2026-04-28T18:34:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that the road traffic accident near Tuen Mun Swimming Pool Stop has now been cleared. Light Rail service is gradually resuming.
